actions.intent: Open the hero puppy's water-facing side immediately.
Shape the urgent route while also starting the later upper pivot.
Bring the hero puppy to one-clear-away and cash the first dock stabilizer.
Take a side stabilizer without abandoning the urgent line.
Prepare the calmer upper puppy only after the hero route is nearly ready.
Extract the hero puppy on the water-rise beat.
Clear a safe upper route group and recover dock shape after the close call.
Use a calm second-rescue setup after the spectacle moment.
Finish the upper puppy without needing another water race.

notes: Designer golden for the spectacle/recovery beat: clear the urgent lower route, rescue just ahead of water, then finish calmly.
